summary: Frontend-only validation of the new Exotic Armor tuning feature in the Builder '02 Exotic Armor' panel. All acceptance criteria pass: tuning-select is hidden until an exotic is chosen, shows 32 options (— no tuning — + Balanced + full 30-entry +5/-5 matrix across 6 stats) once an exotic is picked, shows correct 'Stat change: ...' note on selection, clears when set back to none, disappears when the panel Clear button is used, and also appears for Prismatic Class Item exotics.
critical_code_review_comments: index.html is ~4943 lines — consider splitting into modules for maintainability (non-blocking).
Pre-existing 500 errors on background resource fetches show in console at page load; not triggered by tuning interactions. Investigate/silence in a future pass.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exotic armor is chosen via per-slot dropdowns (Head/Arms/Chest/Legs, plus Class Item under Prismatic) inside the '02 Exotic Armor' panel — there is NO single 'Exotic Armor' select. To trigger the tuning UI programmatically, locate the label with textContent 'Head' (or 'Class Item' for Prismatic) inside the panel, grab the sibling <select>, set .value to a non-empty option, then dispatch a 'change' event. The tuning <select data-testid='exotic-tuning-select'> then appears with 32 options.
